# Aegis

> Aegis is privacy infrastructure for Solana treasuries. It wraps Squads Protocol v4 multisig with cryptographically unlinkable, auditable transfers, so teams keep approval-gated governance while payroll, invoices, and transfers stop appearing on the public ledger.

Aegis is built on Squads (multisig layer) and powered by Cloak (privacy engine). It is currently live on Solana **Devnet** for testing; mainnet ships after external audit. Free to use during devnet.

The product surface is a treasury app: create a vault with members and thresholds, vote on payments through Squads, and Aegis shields the execution. The Operator is a dedicated wallet that only runs payments your members already approved, scoped by a single-use, time-bound permission (60s default).

## What makes Aegis different

- **Bearer invoice** (Aegis exclusive): a claim link you can post publicly or DM without knowing the recipient's wallet upfront. The recipient picks the destination wallet at claim time. Single-claim, default 24h expiry, fully revocable. No other project in the Solana privacy stack does this.
- **Shielded payroll**: drop a CSV, one Squads vote pays everyone, every line is shielded into a single atomic payout. Salaries never appear on-chain.
- **Scoped audit links**: time-limited, read-only links for accountants or regulators, scoped by date, member, or category. Exports are Ed25519-signed, tamper-evident, and verifiable offline. Every view is logged.
- **Squads-native**: real multisig governance, not a custodial wrapper. Members, thresholds, and votes work exactly as Squads users expect.

## How it differs from Arcium, Umbra, Darklake

Those projects shield wallet-to-wallet payments. Aegis wraps the full treasury surface (multisig approvals, payroll, bearer invoices, scoped audit) around a privacy layer. Aegis is not a cipher, it is the product the cipher lives inside.

## Pages

- [Landing](https://aegisz.xyz/): product overview, use cases, comparison, FAQ.
- [Open Vault](https://aegisz.xyz/vault): main app, create or open a vault, run payments, manage members.
- [Create Vault](https://aegisz.xyz/create): new-vault wizard.
- [Claim invoice](https://aegisz.xyz/claim): recipient-side flow for bearer and bound invoices.
- [Audit link](https://aegisz.xyz/audit/[linkId]): read-only auditor view scoped by the link issuer.

## Legal

- [Terms of Use](https://aegisz.xyz/terms): terms governing access to and use of the Service. Devnet-only, no warranty, self-custody, sanctions, IP, liability.
- [Privacy Policy](https://aegisz.xyz/privacy): what we collect (almost nothing), what we store off-chain, third-party infrastructure, your rights.

## FAQ highlights

- **What is Aegis?** A Solana treasury app powered by Squads Protocol v4 multisig, plus privacy primitives, payroll, invoicing, and scoped audit on top.
- **Can I import an existing Squads vault?** Not yet. Today you create a fresh Aegis vault that uses Squads under the hood. Import is on the roadmap.
- **What if the Operator is compromised?** It can only execute payments your team already approved, and cannot create or approve new ones. Replace it with a normal Squads vote.
- **Do permissions expire?** Yes. Every permission is single-use and time-bound (60s default), and is burned on first execute.
- **When is a bearer invoice dangerous?** Anyone with the link can claim, like bearer cash. Default 24h expiry, red-badge UI, revocable before claim. Use bound mode to lock the recipient.
- **Mainnet ready?** Devnet only. Mainnet ships after external audit.
